title: NSDC Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NSDC Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the NSDC Global Group family as a Subject Matter Expert in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NSDC Global Group:
NSDC Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC Global Group!
